items.title: Privacy Stacks
items.description: Modular compositions of tools for on-chain, Lightning, and metadata privacy — including CoinJoin, Silent Payments, Tor, and Nostr/SSH isolation.

items.title: RoboSats
items.description: RoboSats is a peer-to-peer exchange for buying and selling bitcoin using Lightning Network payments. It operates entirely over Tor and uses temporary robot identities, meaning users do not accumulate persistent trade history or reputation.
